name: UFP TECHNOLOGIES INC
summary: UFP Technologies Inc. is a contract development and manufacturing organization specializing in single-use and single-patient medical devices. The company serves as an outsourcing partner to major medical device manufacturers, producing protective drapes for robotic surgery, advanced wound care products, infection prevention disposables, surgical and endoscopic procedure disposables, packaging for orthopedic implants, cardiac implant components, catheter dispenser coils, and biopharma drug manufacturing components.
